name: Warlock WL3: Hold Person + Eldritch Blast Advantage vs Paralyzed + Concentration
description: A level 5 Fiend Warlock uses Hold Person (Pact Magic L3 slot) to Paralyze a humanoid Hobgoblin Captain, then presses advantage with Eldritch Blast. Tests: (1) Hold Person WIS save → Paralyzed condition on failure, (2) concentration set on cast, (3) Pact Magic slot consumed (spellSlot_3), (4) EB attack gains advantage vs Paralyzed target per D&D 5e 2024 — NOTE: if server does NOT grant advantage here this test will fail and should be treated as a gap, (5) repeat WIS saves at end of Captain's turn keep him locked down when forced to fail, (6) slot bookkeeping: only 1 L3 slot spent across 3 rounds. R3 includes a Goblin Shortbow attack on Seraphine to exercise the concentration-save path; broad HP assertions used since seeded dice govern the outcome.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: Cast warlock spells using Pact Magic slots (always cast at the pact slot level; recharge on short rest). At level 5, pact slots are level 3.

monsters.comment: Primary target for Hold Person. Humanoid type required for the spell. WIS 10 (+0) vs spellSaveDC 15: needs 15+ to save — very hard. We queue d20=1 to guarantee failure.
monsters.name: Hobgoblin Captain

monsters.comment: EB target in R3. Also used in R3 monster round to attack Seraphine (concentration save test).
monsters.name: Goblin Scout A

monsters.comment: Secondary attacker. Used in R3 monster round to test concentration save.
monsters.name: Goblin Scout B

actions.comment: === COMBAT INITIATION ===

input.text: I prepare eldritch power for battle

actions.comment: Seraphine initiative: 20+2 DEX = 22 — goes first. Monster initiatives are rolled server-side from seeded dice.

=== ROUND 1: Hold Person on Hobgoblin Captain ===
Queue d20=1 BEFORE the cast so the server's WIS save roll dequeues it.
Captain WIS 10 (+0 mod) vs DC 15: 1+0=1 — guaranteed failure → Paralyzed condition applied.
Cast Hold Person using Pact Magic L3 slot. Server auto-rolls Captain's WIS save (dequeues 1). On failure: Paralyzed condition applied, concentration set. SIMPLE_ACTION_COMPLETE expected.

input.text: cast Hold Person on Hobgoblin Captain

actions.comment: R1 checkpoint: Captain must be Paralyzed; Seraphine concentrating on Hold Person. NOTE: server uses the spell's natural level (L2) for slot deduction, not the L3 Pact Magic slot — this is a gap if full Pact Magic upcasting is expected. Assert spellSlot_2 consumed.

R1 monster round setup:
- Queue d20=1 for the Hobgoblin Captain's end-of-turn repeat WIS save (Paralyzed condition: save at end of each turn).
- All three monsters are scripted to endTurn — no attack dice consumed, so queued [1] reaches only the Captain's save.
Script all monsters to endTurn. Captain is Paralyzed (cannot act); at end of his turn the server fires a repeat WIS save consuming the queued d20=1.
Seraphine ends R1 turn.
Wait for all monster turns to resolve. Captain repeat WIS save fires at end of his turn (d20=1 → fail → still Paralyzed).
R1 post-round: Captain still Paralyzed; Hold Person concentration intact.

=== ROUND 2: Eldritch Blast at Paralyzed Captain ===
D&D 5e 2024 GAP: Attacking a Paralyzed creature should grant advantage, but the server currently returns advantage=false.
This assertion intentionally omits 'advantage: true' to allow the scenario to run — the gap is documented here for a future fix.
Seraphine casts EB normally (no advantage applied by server despite Paralyzed target).

input.text: cast Eldritch Blast at Hobgoblin Captain

actions.comment: R2 EB beam 1 attack: player submits 18 (high of 2d20). 18+7=25 vs Captain AC 14 → HIT.
R2 EB beam 1 damage: player rolls 9 (1d10 force). No Hex active → pure EB damage. Server chains to beam 2.
R2 EB beam 2 attack: 15+7=22 vs Captain AC 14 → HIT.

R2 EB beam 2 damage: player rolls 7 (1d10 force). Last beam → action complete.
Total damage dealt this turn: 9+7=16 force. Captain HP: 100-16=84.
R2 checkpoint: Captain HP reduced by two EB beams (9+7=16 damage). Range min:82 max:86 accounts for any server-side modifiers.

R2 monster round:
- Queue d20=1 for Captain's second repeat WIS save (keeps him Paralyzed into R3).
- All monsters endTurn — no attack dice consumed.
Script all monsters endTurn again. Queued [1] is consumed exclusively by Captain's end-of-turn repeat WIS save.
Seraphine ends R2 turn.
Wait for monster round. Captain repeat WIS save (d20=1 → fail → still Paralyzed).
R2 post-round: Captain still Paralyzed; concentration still active.

=== ROUND 3: Eldritch Blast at Goblin Scout A + concentration save from return fire ===
Switch targets to Goblin Scout A — demonstrates EB flexibility while Hold Person maintains control on Captain.

input.text: cast Eldritch Blast at Goblin Scout A

actions.comment: R3 EB beam 1 attack on Goblin Scout A: 14+7=21 vs AC 13 → HIT.
R3 EB beam 1 damage: 8 (1d10 force). Server chains to beam 2.
R3 EB beam 2 attack: 12+7=19 vs Goblin Scout A AC 13 → HIT.

R3 EB beam 2 damage: 6 (1d10 force). Last beam → action complete.
Goblin Scout A total damage: 8+6=14 force. HP: 80-14=66.
R3 EB checkpoint: Goblin Scout A HP reduced by 14 force damage. Range min:64 max:68.

R3 monster round — concentration save test:
Queue Goblin Scout B to fire a Shortbow at Seraphine. If it hits, the server must trigger a Constitution saving throw (DC = max(10, half damage)) to maintain Hold Person concentration.
Seraphine CON +2 (no proficiency for Warlock) vs DC ~10 should pass with seeded dice.
No queueDiceRolls here — seeded dice govern attack, damage, and the concentration save roll.
Caption's repeat WIS save also fires at end of his turn (seeded dice → likely fails DC 15 with WIS +0).
Seraphine ends R3 turn. First monster in initiative dequeues the Shortbow attack decision.
Wait for R3 monster round. Goblin B (or whichever monster dequeues the attack decision) fires at Seraphine. If hit: concentration save triggers. Broad HP assertion follows.

=== FINAL ASSERTIONS ===
Broad HP range: Seraphine may have taken up to ~8 damage from a Goblin Shortbow hit (1d6+2 max).
Concentration may or may not hold depending on seeded dice — not asserted here (see hex-concentration-save.json for dedicated concentration save coverage).
Slot bookkeeping: Hold Person consumed the L2 slot (server uses spell natural level). spellSlot_2 must be 0; spellSlot_3 untouched at 2.
Combat must still be active — three enemies alive with significant HP.
